## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members and provide an overview of GrowthX's organizational structure, client management processes, and key tools.](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kyle is transitioning to a sales role; Matthew will lead client delivery](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [New org structure: Directors oversee Managing Editors, who lead pods of Content Managers](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Extensive resources available in Notion for client info, onboarding, and company processes](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Linear being implemented as new project management tool for account tasks](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [Fathom AI tool useful for quick insights from recorded client meetings](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

## Topics

### Organizational Changes and Structure

  - [Kyle moving to sales role; Matthew (former TechCrunch editor-in-chief) now leads client delivery](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [New layer of directors overseeing managing editors and content manager pods](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Org chart shared: directors focus on strategy, enablement, people, process, and technology](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Some temporary pod assignments due to recent staff changes (e.g., Branko's placement)](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)

### Client Management Tools and Processes

  - [Clients database in Notion: maps accounts to team members, includes SOWs and work streams](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Shared workspaces for each client in Notion: internal drafting, company briefs, meeting notes](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Common work streams: editorial + content refresh (long-form) and programmatic (template-based)](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Linear being implemented as new project management tool for account task tracking](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)

### Onboarding Resources

  - [Onboarding tracker in Notion: suggested timeline for completing various tasks](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [Circle platform: contains training videos and walkthroughs](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Handbook section in Notion: company vision, processes, and "must-knows"](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [AI workshop recording: provides context on GrowthX's approach to content automation](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)

### Communication Channels

  - [Slack channels organized with prefixes: "B-" for build (engineering/product) and "D-" for delivery (client-facing)](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [General channels available for team-wide and company-wide questions](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)

### Key Tools

  - [Notion: central hub for company information, client data, and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Airtable: used to build "content OS" for organizing articles by status and topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [Fathom: AI tool for quick insights from recorded client meetings](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Linear: new project management tool being implemented](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)

## Next Steps

  - New team members to accept Notion invitations and gain access to resources
  - Review onboarding tracker and begin completing suggested tasks
  - Explore Circle platform for training videos and walkthroughs
  - Familiarize with Notion structure, especially client workspaces and handbook
  - [Start watching AI workshop recording for context on GrowthX's approach](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Reach out to Kyle or Wiets for any access issues or onboarding questions](https://fathom.video/share/YRuDSSVjzn2VB3i6uMVz3X7CapEMnXmm?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
